_description: Vanilla Tailwind CSS with no component library. Semantic HTML elements styled directly via utility classes. No Radix, no shadcn, no Mantine.

tailwind.colorTokens: Tailwind default palette (slate/zinc/neutral + one accent). Recommend configuring a small semantic alias set in tailwind.config.ts (bg, surface, text, muted, accent).

patterns.spacing: Container: mx-auto max-w-7xl px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8. Sections: py-16 sm:py-24. Vertical rhythm via space-y-* or gap-*.
patterns.typography: Native Tailwind font-sans / font-serif. Headings: text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight. Body: text-base text-gray-600 / text-gray-700. No @tailwindcss/typography assumed.
conventions: Semantic HTML primitives — <button>, <a>, <section>, <article> — styled with utilities
No component library dependencies; compose small local components per file
Prefer utility classes over @apply; @apply only in globals.css for reset/base
Accent color centralised as a single --accent CSS variable or theme color
Icons as inline SVG or from a single light library (lucide-react, heroicons)
